sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18965" key="babra/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαβράζω</orth>, <sense id="n18965.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chatter, chirp,</tr_> of the grasshopper, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0238.tlg001:5:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anan.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
